name: IdsEdwProvTypDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT PROV_TYP_CD_SK AS PROV_TYP_SK, PROV_TYP_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PROV_TYP_NM, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_TYP_CD) SELECT * FROM cte

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwProvTypDExtr
Read all the Data from IDS PROV_TYP_CD Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK
Write Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvTaxDLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
